heading: Relocation services
label: 5724c Relocation services
text: Under regulations prescribed under , each agency may enter into contracts to provide relocation services to agencies and employees for the purpose of carrying out this subchapter. An agency may pay a fee for such services. Such services include arranging for the purchase of a transferred employee’s residence.section 5738 of this title
notes: Amendments1996— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “Under such regulations as the President may prescribe, each agency is authorized to enter into contracts to provide relocation services to agencies and employees for the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this subchapter. Such services include but need not be limited to arranging for the purchase of a transferred employee’s residence.”Pub. L. 104–2011984— amended section generally, adding authority of the President to prescribe regulations.Pub. L. 98–473
Effective Date of 1996 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 104–201section 1725(a) of Pub. L. 104–201section 5722 of this titleSept. 23, 1996
